name: Best Permutation
input:
The first line contains one integer $t$ ($1 \le t \le 97$) — the number of test cases.
The only line of each test case contains one integer $n$ ($4 \le n \le 100$).
output: For each test case, print $n$ integers — the permutation $p$ of size $n$ with the maximum possible value among all permutations of size $n$.
